Therefore, we can expect growing investment in [AI services](https://www.itransition.com/ai) to incorporate this technology across a wider spectrum of use cases, as predicted by Gartner. * [Business functions](https://www.itransition.com/ai/use-cases#functions). * [Industries](https://www.itransition.com/ai/use-cases#industries). * [Benefits](h

AI use cases: an in-depth trend overview for 2026 December 23, 2025 Home Artificial intelligence Artificial intelligence use cases AI use cases span diverse functions and industries, supporting a wide range of business scenarios.
In practice, most AI applications focus on automating time-consuming business processes, providing customers with personalized experiences, and analyzing large datasets for better decision-making.
According to McKinsey, the use of AI across organizations has been on the rise for years, growing from 50% in 2022 to 88% in 2025.
Capgemini reported a similar trend for GenAI specifically, with the deployment rate growing from 20% in 2024 to 36% in 2025.
Organizations are also becoming more mature in their use of AI.
